complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the setup process into subtasks for initializing the monorepo, configuring the frontend and extension scaffolds, setting up shared packages, configuring code quality tools, integrating CI/CD, and establishing testing frameworks.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Decompose the toolbar implementation into subtasks for component scaffolding, responsive design, NPM packaging, framework wrappers, state management, and accessibility features.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Building a reusable, accessible component library with multi-framework support and robust state management is moderately complex, requiring attention to UI, packaging, and integration.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Develop DOM Element Selection & Context Capture Engine

complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Thread management with persistence, recovery, and branching in a VSCode extension involves complex state handling and integration with storage and communication layers.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement Agent Adapter Pattern for Cursor and Windsurf

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Develop Shared Threading & Context Synchronization System

complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Real-time synchronization, versioning, and branching across distributed agents and users is highly complex, requiring careful design for consistency and recovery.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the UI into subtasks for agent selection, recommendations, execution logic (parallel/sequential), response aggregation, comparison views, and manual override controls.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Designing a dynamic UI for orchestration, integrating recommendations, and supporting complex execution flows adds moderate complexity.
